title: Climate Change & Marine Ecosystems
outline: The aim of this course is to introduce students to the effects of climate change on marine and coastal ecosystems and the implications for marine ecosystem services. The course focuses on three themes: (i) changing marine and coastal environments in the face of climate change; (ii) linking biological responses to climate-induced drivers; and (iii) climate change impacts on marine ecosystem services.
dp_requirements: At least 80% attendance and submission of all assignments.
assessment: Research paper 25%; seminar presentation 20%; poster 15%; exam 40%.
